feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: What are the characteristics of the mafia or gangs in your country?
entry.content: In Japan, someone missing a little finger is a former member of the Japanese mafia. A few years ago, I saw some yakuza at a pasta restaurant. There were several luxury cars in the parking lot, and the windows had purple curtains. At the back of the restaurant, there was an elderly man wearing a fedora and a purple scarf, with several men in suits standing around him. I assume that old man was a high-ranking yakuza boss.

entry.content: anyone else tired of dead image hosts that nuke your links in a day? found this easypics.org/explore no signup no app, no bullshit live rooms, you see who's watching in real time drag, drop, share the link, done threads stay up, reactions are live, comments are live it's basically what chatpic should've been before it died

entry.title: /mu/ Music: What percentage of a catalog can you dislike while saying you like an artist?
entry.content: I was thinking about the phenomenon of listening to an artist's catalog and liking maybe 50/50 or even only 25/75 of their work......if you really like those songs but don't really care for most of their work, at what point can you say whether you like an Artist or not? I get with Pop it is different but with other music where image is less of a thing, I am curious......

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /glory/ - Discord Gloryhole Bot General
entry.content: GloryBot is an anonymous chatbot that quietly pairs you up with another member for a private one-on-one conversation, and neither of you ever see who the other is. You talk through the bot's DMs and it carries your messages back and forth. https://discord.gg/3B2DR9hEKh Previous: >>83608956

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Disney Failed to Buy James Bond Franchise, Walked Away From Owning Twitter
entry.content: >“It was like the clouds lifted and the sun started to shine again,” Iger said. “We put together a list of acquisition targets. Marvel was one, ‘Star Wars’ was another, James Bond was one. We had a list and I figured let’s just tick them off and buy them all.” >James Bond is the franchise that got away (Amazon is its current owner). Other companies did, too. Iger told FT that he was close to buying Twitter from owner Jack Dorsey “at a very attractive price.” The plan was to turn Twitter into a g

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I had never listened to or seen Oliver Tree talk before his passing. I often saw…
entry.content: I had never listened to or seen Oliver Tree talk before his passing. I often saw his face in Youtube thumbnails and what not but never clicked. Anyway I have listened to some songs and also watched a lot of his interviews.. especially his podcast appearances on H3H3. The guy seemed really nice, cool and very passionate about what he did. Even though i've barely watched the guy, I feel extremely sad about his passing. I keep thinking about how he must have felt when the helicopter was going down.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Automated moderation has ruined social media
entry.content: >have instagram account for lite trolling >get banned for rapidly commenting once >appeal >get unbanned 10 mins later >get auto-banned 10 mins later >appeal >repeat 10x >these random bans keep coming despite the fact I ceased my activity completely, I always get unsuspended in 10 minutes >one day the random ban can't be appealed >account lost forever, no reason provided, no platform to write a form to get an actual person to review my case >have private xitter account for bookmarking >11 year ol

entry.content: I was planning to buy a car for $10k but I can't make up my fucking mind which car to buy so I've been paying for an empty parking spot since I sold my previous car more than a month ago. Anyone ever buy a total shitbox just to have something to drive while you're making up your mind what to buy? Is that a good idea?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Club Nintendo DSi Event
entry.content: Okay /v/, I need your help. At some point in early 2009 I was invited to a special club Nintendo platinum member event to preview the DSi at Universal City Walk in Los Angeles. While there we got to test out the DSi, get photos printed of our faces with Mario overlays saying “this is what I look like on DSi” and were given Wii Fit tote bags and Wii branded water bottles. The thing is, I cannot find any record or details about this event ever existing. There was a midnight launch party there a fe

Sure, trannies are too often annoying, but ridding 4chan of /lgbt/ solves nothing because 4chan is a fucking anonymous, no-registration Internet forum. trannies are bound to post regardless if there's /lgbt/. entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: It is impossible to visualize the scale of the universe in the part of the unive…
entry.content: It is impossible to visualize the scale of the universe in the part of the universe we can see. There are something like roughly two trillion galaxies; we haven’t counted them all, but that is an estimate based on surveys of the local universe. Two trillion, two thousand billion galaxies, and each galaxy is, let’s say, around the size of the Milky Way. Some are bigger, some are smaller, but the Milky Way has 400 billion stars in it. It takes light over 100,000 years to cross a galaxy, and there

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Friends, i think i think i got raped by my sister. I fell asleep and all i could…
entry.content: Friends, i think i think i got raped by my sister. I fell asleep and all i could see and remember was silent and a pale hand giving me food, i looked back to my bad and i saw pale feminine leggs trying to hide intimal parts. Later, i heard on my phone a rough sex sound, like it was the first time, i kept sleeping for 2 days i barely could walk. What did she give me? Nobody believes me when i tell this :(
